name: BoxCast
description: BoxCast — end-to-end live video streaming for events and broadcasters

seo.title: BoxCast — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: BoxCast: BoxCast — end-to-end live video streaming for events and broadcasters

when_to_use: End-to-end live event broadcasting for churches and venues
VOD hosting and distribution for event recordings
Live streaming with viewer analytics for conference organizers
CDN-backed video delivery for educational live broadcasts
Replacing on-site hardware encoders with cloud broadcasting

pros: Managed workflow from ingest to viewer
Simulcast to YouTube, Facebook, custom sites
cons: Developer API is thin vs Mux or Livepeer
Pricing aimed at orgs, not individual creators
review.verdict: Turnkey live streaming for non-technical orgs — but devs building custom platforms should look elsewhere.
review.best_for: Churches, schools, and regional broadcasters wanting hardware-plus-cloud without engineering staff.
review.not_for: Developers building programmable video into their own product.
